prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜2026年约第58名，近年排名稳定在52–61区间，属全国中上游水平；2025–2026年声誉 评价为明显负面，主要涉及师德师风事件（副院长婚内出轨被免职、误挂旭日旗事件），可能对部分考生报考心理产生一定抑制；抖音热度排名第69，评价为一般，未出现高热关 注；教育学A、马克思主义理论A、地理学A、中国语言文学A-、外国语言文学A-，师范类学科实力突出，与招生专业中化学（师范）、生物科学（师范）等直接 关联。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 师范/教育类专业社会热度分化观望，整体平稳；电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业高热推荐，但该校物理类招生以师范类、食品、材料为主， 非当前最热工科方向；黑龙江省2026年普通高考总人数约16.7万，较2025年（物理类+历史类约17.2万）略有减少，竞争压力小幅缓解；省控线物理类本科批360分连续两年持平， 难度稳定；南京师范大学位于江苏省南京市，属长三角发达地区，对黑龙江省考生有一定跨省吸引力；该校在黑龙江省招生规模较小（14–17人），地域偏好对 位次影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次9334名、2026年缩招约17.6%（使位次数字减小）、声誉负面事件（使位次数字增大）及本省考生总数小幅减少等因素，缩 招效应略占主导但声誉负面形成对冲；预测2026年物理类最低位次约8396名，区间7896–8896名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 4657 → 9258 → 12917 → 11693 → 9334, showing a significant overall downward trend. Since 2022, the ranking jumped to outside 9000, fluctuating between 9300 and 13000 in the last three years. The 2025 baseline is about 9334. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Heilongjiang Province was 12 in 2021, 17 in 2022, 16 in 2023, 16 in 2024, and 17 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 14, a reduction of about 17.6% compared to 2025, slightly easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, it is approximately 58th, with recent rankings stable in the 52–61 range, placing it at the upper-middle level nationally. From 2025 to 2026, its reputation evaluation is clearly negative, mainly due to teacher ethics incidents (a vice dean was dismissed for extramarital affairs, and an incident of mistakenly displaying the Rising Sun flag), which may somewhat suppress some candidates' willingness to apply. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 69, evaluated as average, without high attention. It has A in Education, A in Marxist Theory, A in Geography, A- in Chinese Language and Literature, and A- in Foreign Languages and Literature, with strong teacher-training disciplines directly related to enrollment majors such as Chemistry (Teacher Training) and Biological Sciences (Teacher Training).

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of teacher-training/education majors is divided and watchful, overall stable. Engineering majors like Electronic Information/Communication and Electrical Engineering are highly recommended, but the university's Physics Category enrollment mainly focuses on teacher-training, food science, and materials, not the current hottest engineering directions. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Heilongjiang Province general college entrance examination is about 167,000, a slight decrease from 2025 (about 172,000 for Physics + History categories), slightly easing competition pressure. The provincial control line for Physics Category undergraduate batch has been 360 points for two consecutive years, indicating stable difficulty. Nanjing Normal University is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu Province, in the developed Yangtze River Delta region, which has some cross-provincial appeal for Heilongjiang candidates. The university's enrollment scale in Heilongjiang Province is small (14–17 people), so regional preference has limited impact on rankings.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 9334, the 2026 enrollment reduction of about 17.6% (which decreases the ranking number), negative reputation incidents (which increase the ranking number), and a slight decrease in the total number of candidates in the province, the reduction effect slightly dominates but is offset by the negative reputation. The predicted 2026 minimum ranking for Physics Category is about 8396, with a range of 7896–8896.

- Chemistry (Teacher Training)
- Biological Sciences (Teacher Training)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Food Science and Engineering
- Electrical Engineering and Automation (enrolled in 2025, not in 2026)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Acoustics
- Materials Science and Engineering (enrolled in 2025, not in 2026)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 7896–8896, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, make appropriate attempts at Tier 1 majors, and use Tier 3 majors as a safe backup. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<7896), you can focus on sprinting for advantageous teacher-training majors like Chemistry (Teacher Training).
